name: Rust project skeleton
value: Proves the toolchain and stdio transport before any AST logic lands.

name: Workspace safety
value: Locks path validation, file size limits, and the no-write and no-LSP architectural lint tests.

name: Parser registry
value: Wires 5 V1 Tree-sitter parsers and extension routing; the only place tree-sitter crates are mentioned.

name: Basic parsing tools
value: Ships the first 3 of 12 V1 tools (health_check, list_supported_languages, parse_file) and validates the full pipeline.

name: Position conversion
value: Stabilizes UTF-16 to byte-offset conversion; every range-returning tool depends on this.

name: Outline and top-level nodes
value: Ships ast_file_outline and ast_top_level_nodes; proves the extractor pattern that phases 7-10 reuse.

name: Enclosing node
value: Ships ast_enclosing_node with kind filter and ancestors.

name: Imports and exports
value: Ships ast_find_imports and ast_find_exports for TS, JS, and Python.

name: Functions and classes
value: Ships ast_find_functions and ast_find_classes with method, parameter, and return-type extraction.

name: Chunking
value: Ships ast_chunk_file with all 4 strategies and stable chunk IDs.

name: Tree-sitter query
value: Ships ast_query with timeout and capture normalization.

name: V1 acceptance tests
value: Runs the full test suite, verifies every acceptance criterion, and produces the V1 acceptance report.
